home.headline: Hi, I am Jhonas Sotero a Software Developer
home.tagline: Build reliable and scalable apps that solve real problems, delivering performance, usability, and clean interfaces.

skills.title: Software Development
skills.desc: Experienced in building and maintaining enterprise applications using modern tech stacks. Bringing innovation in system design and best-in-class implementation.

skills.title: Mobile Development
skills.desc: Developing Android applications using Unity, Flutter and Kotlin. Delivering various platforms of web or app programming on time and ensuring quality.

skills.title: Database & System Management
skills.desc: Adept in designing and managing databases of all sizes, working with MySQL, SQLite, and PostgreSQL. Experienced in system reliability, reporting, and CI/CD pipelines.

home.cta_banner: Ready to Bring Your Idea to Life?

bio: A Bachelor of Science in Information Technology graduate with a strong foundation in programming, systems development, and problem-solving. Served as the main programmer for our Capstone project, demonstrating expertise and dedication in programming field.

Recognized as a National Champion in the Tagisan ng Talino Codefest Competition 2025, showcasing exceptional technical skills and teamwork. Highly motivated to begin a career in the IT industry, with a strong commitment to learning, innovation, and delivering quality solutions.
about.what_i_do_sub: I work on full-stack applications, back-end systems and databases, and develop scalable enterprise solutions.

qualifications.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

projects.title: Centra Suite
projects.desc: A combined ERP system built for mid-sized businesses. Integrated inventory, POS, accounting & HR and reporting into one unified, real-time management platform.
projects.detail: The system supports robust multi-module workflows covering finance, inventory tracking, employee management and payroll, point-of-sale transactions, and detailed analytics dashboards.

projects.title: Smart Essay
projects.desc: An AI-powered essay evaluation system that uses OCR and NLP to automate student essay analysis and provide structured rubric-based feedback.
projects.detail: Reduces instructors' manual workload while maintaining high quality assessment. Offers customizable scoring criteria and feedback that helps students understand strengths and areas for improvement.

projects.title: Kuya App
projects.desc: A real-time mobile delivery app designed to connect vendors, couriers, food providers, and consumers within the community.
projects.detail: Built using Flutter and Firebase, providing seamless order tracking with real-time updates, push notifications, and an intuitive driver-partner interface for streamlined last-mile delivery.

contact.heading: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
contact.sub: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
